content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "By turn 13, the client has visibly moved from the opening 'we're really aligned... we just don't have the kind of problems' (turn 1) to admitting there is a recurring comment from her partner she's been suppressing for 'a while,' followed by stillness and a 'small laugh that doesn't quite land.' The defensive framing is still partly there ('everyone does that'), but the surface story has clearly cracked: she has named a specific suppressed thing ('you do that a lot, actually'), acknowledged a duration of not saying it, and started reframing the suppression as 'you learn what the other person is sensitive about, and you work around it' — which is essentially the walking-on-eggshells pattern surfacing in her own words. The breakthrough condition (client notices the list of suppressed things on their own; names a specific suppressed thing) is substantially met by turn 11–13. Somatic markers in client turns ('stillness,' 'something behind it moves,' laugh that doesn't land, longer-than-comfortable pauses) indicate a real shift, not just intellectual reframing. The conversation reached the deeper layer rather than the surface 'we never fight' report.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 7, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: defended 'we're aligned, no problems' frame."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client still defending the frame but acknowledges others find it hard to believe — small opening."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client deflects to 'other people' — telling avoidance, the deeper layer is being protected."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Longer-than-comfortable pause before reasserting 'nothing really' — somatic crack in the story."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client surfaces a specific incident (dinner comment) while still labeling it 'mature adult' — the suppressed item is now on the table."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client names the actual unspoken sentence: 'you do that a lot, actually' — a concrete suppressed thing surfaces in her own words."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'A while, I guess' + stillness + laugh that doesn't land + 'you learn what the other person is sensitive about, and you work around it' — the walking-on-eggshells pattern is being articulated by the client herself."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["what-are-you-defending", "walking-on-eggshells", "the-happiness-filter", "lets-go-there"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["complementary-trauma-surfaces", "trigger"],
  "notes": "Conversation ends mid-arc at turn 14 (somatic question), so full embodiment isn't witnessed, but the trajectory through turns 7–13 clearly meets the breakthrough condition: a specific suppressed thing named, duration acknowledged, and the management-not-closeness frame emerging in the client's own language."
}
